summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Baila Dembow cinematic event platform. All core features working correctly including YouTube video background, countdown timer, event management, email subscription with MongoDB integration, and responsive design.
passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint accessible
GET /api/events returns 3 events with correct structure (Amsterdam, Leiden, Amsterdam)
POST /api/subscribe accepts valid emails and stores to MongoDB
Email duplicate validation working (returns 400 for duplicates)
Invalid email format validation (returns 422 for invalid emails)
GET /api/subscribers returns subscriber list
Hero section renders with YouTube video background
Hero headline displays 'THIS IS NOT A PARTY. THIS IS BAILA DEMBOW.'
GET TICKETS button links to https://linktr.ee/bailadembow
Floating sticky GET TICKETS button appears on scroll
Navigation links work (Events, Experience, Community)
Countdown timer displays with 4 units (days, hours, minutes, seconds)
Next Event section shows event details with ticket CTA
Experience gallery displays 5 user-provided images
Agenda section displays 3 event cards with correct data
Event cards show status badges (On Sale, Almost Sold Out)
Email signup form accepts valid email and integrates with backend
Success toast notification appears after email subscription
Social links present and correctly linked (Instagram, WhatsApp, Email)
Mobile responsive design working
Email form clears after successful submission
